issues.description: Missing optional condition: card text says 'You may trash 1 card' but DSL does not implement optionality
TrashFromHand should have count:1 specified; currently has empty filter

Missing opponent's choice structure: card text presents two mutually exclusive options (opponent chooses), but DSL only implements ForceDiscard (2 cards). Second option 'Trash 1 card from opponent's Life cards' is completely missing
ForceDiscard in thenActions targets self by default, but should target opponent

suggestedDsl.effectText: [On Play] You may trash 1 card from your hand: Your opponent chooses one: • Your opponent trashes 2 cards from their hand. • Trash 1 card from the top of your opponent's Life cards.

choices.description: Opponent trashes 2 cards from their hand
Trash 1 card from opponent's Life cards
